# yardang

> Easily generate sphinx documentation


the yardang authors

- [Calculator C++ API Documentation](examples/cpp/docs/api.html.md): This page demonstrates how to use breathe to document C++ code with yardang.
- [API Reference](docs/src/api.html.md): Generate Sphinx documentation configuration from pyproject.toml.

- [Struct `calculator::ScientificCalculator`](api/crates/calculator/structs/calculator::ScientificCalculator.html.md): A scientific calculator with additional mathematical functions.
